---
title: "KmPlot_Table1_Analysis"
author: "Dipankor Dhrubo"
date: "2025-09-19"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(tableone)
library(knitr)
library(tidyverse)
install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("spakowiczlab/mt.surv")

```


```{r}
#reading in the data from 00_processing_clinical_CRCORIEN2025.Rmd script 

processed <- read_rds("/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Data/Lung_resampled_data.rds")

## Some minor improvement

processed_2 <- processed %>%
  mutate(
    Histology = case_when(
      grepl("adenocarcinoma|Adenocarcinoma|acinar|papillary|lepidic|mucinous|minimally invasive", Histology, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Adenocarcinoma",
      grepl("squamous cell|squamous|basaloid", Histology, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Squamous Cell Carcinoma",
      grepl("neuroendocrine", Histology, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Neuroendocrine Carcinoma",
      grepl("mesothelioma|sarcoma|seminoma|thymoma|malignant tumor|pleomorphic|paraganglioma|spindle", Histology, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Other Tumors",
      TRUE ~ "Other Carcinoma"  # Any diagnosis not fitting the above
    )) 

```

```{r}
# mtsurv plot generation

Clinical <- processed_2 %>%
  select(sample, diagsurvtime, status) %>%
  dplyr::rename(vitalstatus = status) %>% mutate(days = as.numeric(diagsurvtime)) %>%
  select(-diagsurvtime,sample, days, vitalstatus)

Clinical<-Clinical[,c(1,3,2)] # Make sure you look at the dataframe first to select the correct columns.

Abundance_data<- processed_2 %>% select(sample,Normalize_Candida)

survoutput <- mt.surv::survivalByQuantile("Normalize_Candida", Abundance_data, Clinical)

# Removing the NA value

survoutput<- survoutput[complete.cases(survoutput),]

# Creating the plot

survoutput %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = percentile, y = -log10(pval), color = hazard.direction)) +
  geom_line(lwd = 1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05),
             linetype = "dashed") +
  theme_bw()


ggsave("/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/exotho/exploratory/Figures/ORIEN_NSCLC2025/mtsurv_ORIEN_candida.png", height = 3, width = 6)

```


```{r}
Candia<- mtsurv_data_2 %>% filter(genus=="Candida")

Clinical <- Candia %>%
  select(sample, vitalstatus, days)

Abundance_data<- Candia %>% select(sample,sum.counts)

survoutput <- mt.surv::survivalByQuantile("sum.counts", Abundance_data, Clinical)

# Removing the NA value

survoutput<- survoutput[complete.cases(survoutput),]

# Creating the plot

survoutput %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = percentile, y = -log10(pval), color = hazard.direction)) +
  geom_line(lwd = 1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05),
             linetype = "dashed") +
  theme_bw()



```
